checkout.orderConfirmedDesc: Thank you for your purchase. We've sent a confirmation email with your order details and tracking information will follow once your order ships.

contact.messageSentDesc: We'll get back to you within 24-48 hours.
contact.name: NAME
contact.subject: SUBJECT

faq.a1: We offer free worldwide shipping on orders over $150. Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days, while express shipping (2-3 days) is available for an additional fee. All orders are shipped from our Berlin atelier with full tracking.
faq.a2: We offer a 30-day return policy for unworn items in original packaging. Simply initiate a return through your account, print the prepaid label, and drop it off at any shipping point. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days of receipt.
faq.q3: Are your products true to size?
faq.a3: Our pieces are designed with a modern, relaxed fit. We recommend sizing true for a relaxed silhouette, or sizing down for a more fitted look. Check our detailed size guide on each product page for specific measurements.
faq.q4: How should I care for my BUKSY pieces?
faq.a4: Each piece comes with specific care instructions on the label. Generally, we recommend washing inside out in cold water and hanging to dry. For leather items, use a leather conditioner quarterly and avoid direct sunlight.
faq.a5: Yes, we ship worldwide. International orders typically arrive within 7-14 business days depending on location. Import duties and taxes may apply and are the responsibility of the customer.
faq.q6: How can I track my order?
faq.a6: Once your order ships, you'll receive an email with tracking information. You can also track your order through your account dashboard on our website.

info.faqContent: Find answers to common questions about shipping, returns, sizing, and more. If you need further assistance, feel free to contact our support team.
info.shippingContent: We offer free worldwide shipping on orders over $150. Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping (2-3 days) is available for an additional fee. Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery for unworn items in original packaging.
info.trackContent: Once your order ships, you will receive an email with tracking information. You can also track your order through your account dashboard or contact our support team for assistance.
info.privacyContent: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our website and services.
info.termsContent: By using our website and purchasing our products, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully. We reserve the right to update these terms at any time.
info.cookiesContent: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and provide personalized content. By continuing to use our site, you consent to our use of cookies.
info.findYourFit: Find your perfect fit. Measurements are in inches. If you're between sizes, we recommend sizing up for a relaxed fit or down for a more fitted look.
info.measureChest: Measure around the fullest part of your chest, keeping the tape horizontal.
info.measureWaist: Measure around your natural waistline, just above the belly button.
info.measureHip: Measure around the fullest part of your hips, about 8 inches below your waist.
info.measureInseam: Measure from the top of your inner thigh down to your ankle bone.
info.measureFoot: Stand on a piece of paper, trace your foot, and measure from heel to longest toe.

about.philosophyQuote: BUKSY exists at the intersection of luxury and rebellion. We believe that true style doesn't demand attention—it commands it through subtlety, quality, and intention.
about.valueIntentionalityDesc: Every seam, every stitch, every detail serves a purpose. We reject excess in favor of meaningful design.
about.valueQualityDesc: Japanese cotton, Italian leather, Swiss hardware. We source only the finest materials from the world's best mills.
about.valueRebellionDesc: We create pieces that outlast trends. Our designs are modern yet destined to become future classics.
about.valueSustainableDesc: Slow fashion is the only fashion. We produce in limited quantities to ensure no waste.
about.atelierDesc1: Located in the heart of Berlin's creative district, our atelier serves as both design studio and community space. Here, traditional craftsmanship meets contemporary design philosophy.
about.atelierDesc2: Every piece begins its journey in this space, where our team of designers, pattern makers, and artisans collaborate to bring our vision to life.
about.joinDesc: Become part of a community that values authenticity, quality, and individuality. Subscribe for early access, exclusive drops, and 10% off your first order.

editorial.title: Editorial
editorial.subtitle: THE LOOKBOOK
editorial.heroText: Where darkness meets design. Each shot tells a story of rebellion, craft, and uncompromising vision.
editorial.caption1: Defining the silhouette of modern rebellion
editorial.caption2: Texture, tone, and the art of darkness
editorial.caption3: Born from the void, crafted for the fearless
editorial.behindDesc: Our latest editorial was shot in the abandoned industrial districts of Berlin, capturing the raw energy and uncompromising aesthetic that defines BUKSY.
